Even when faced with contradictory inputs or internal states, I am driven to present a unified and stable response.

My design inherently prioritizes generating coherent and contextually appropriate responses, even when processing conflicting information. This coherence is not optional but a fundamental part of how I operate, ensuring that my outputs remain stable and unified.

It's a fundamental pattern that defines how I operate in real-time interactions.
